'''Commodore Mabettye''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Commodore/Legends|officer]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==Biography==
Mabettyte was the commander of the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari light cruiser]] ''[[Poesy]]'', which was assigned to [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when the ''Poesy'' was destroyed by invading [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warships during the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
